abwaanno.name: Qaamuus Soomaali-Ingiriis - Madiina Cismaan, R Deefid Zork [1993]

a: df.art., the, (af) used with its support.
á, ad., this, that, (af) used with its support.
aal: or ahal, f.n., slime or viscous matter mixed with blood (in dysentery).—shi.
‘ab: v.tr., drink (this verb is used for any liquid except milk, coffee, and broth); biyaha “ab, drink water; dawada ‘ab, drink the medicine; biyo ‘ab o hamri iss ka da, drink water and not wine; biyaha la 'ab, the water is drunk.
‘absi: v.c., cause or give to drink ; i ‘absi, make me or give me to drink.
'abād: m.n., camels grunting (while its burden is fastened on). —ki; aur ‘abādked ma je‘li, I do not like the camel’s grunting.
abah: m.n., time of birth.—hi: hashi nerig bai abahha ku dashai or dalatai, the she-camel brought forth her young one.
abaḥ: m.n., lean animal. —hi; aurkasi wa geli abaḥah, that camel is lean.
abaḥ, v.i., be lean ;wu abiḥi, he will be lean.
‘abai: v.tr., load a gun; bunduha ‘abai, load the gun.
abāl: m.n., gratitude, acknowledgment, remuneration, requital. —ki; abālka ān ku (pi. idin) habo or haiyo weligi wu jiri, my gratitude for you will last forever; hadiyadda an ku so diro wa abālkan ku haba or haiya, the gift I send you is an acknowledgment; wa abalké, it is your requital; abal u hab, be grateful; abal ban ad ugu habai or abal ada yan u habai, I was very grateful to him; wahhasi wa abalkai, it is for my gratitude.
abālgud: u abālgud, v.tr., reward; i abālgud, reward me; wan ku abālgudai, I rewarded you.
abālgudi: v.tr., reward (only used by some, especially by people from the west)
abālmari: v.tr., be grateful, thank, reward. —ya or abālmarsha, —wan n; aniga abbaha abālmariyai, I was grateful to the father.
abar: f.n., drought, sterility, famine. —ti ; bilad somalied abar ba ka da'dai or bilad somalied o dami abar wa lehyahai, there is everywhere drought in the Somali country; wa abar, there is famine; abarta meshas ka da'dai ad ba lo ogyahai, the sterility of that place is well known.
abba: m.n., father. —hi ; aiya abba, or abbai, or abbo! my father.
abban: m.n.f friend, protector, guide, conductor. —ki; (guest and host are abban;) abban dulai, m.n., chief, leader.
abbanso: v.r., become friends with ; ninkas abbanso, put yourself under the protection of that man, or become friends with that man.
'abbar: m.n., moment, short time, a while. —ki; 'abbar jog, wait a moment ; 'abbar la hadso, sit a moment with him.
abhad: f.n., small box made with the bark of trees tacked together. —di.
abho: f.n., fruit of a thorny tree called huda', of which sheep and goats are very fond.
abid: and abki, ad., never (these words are never employed alone as given, but inflected according to the person speaking or spoken of (s. gram.).
abodi: m.n., large bird of prey, having a red beak and red legs. —gi
abor: m.n., Bpeoies of white ants making their hills or houses in the desert. —ki.
'abso: v.i., be afraid or frightened. —da, wan —n.
'absileh: a., dangerous, perilous; war! mel 'absileh ina gei, take us to a dangerous place.
abti: m.n., maternal uncle. —gi; or hoyada walalked, the mother's brother.
abtirsinyo: m.n., genealogy. -hi; 'Issa abtirsinyihisi, the genealogy of Jesus.
‘abud: v.tr., adore ; ha lagu 'abudo, be thou adored.
abud: v.tr., shut, close (employed lor small boxes), cork a bottle abhadda abud, shut or close the box ; haruradda abud.
'abud: v.tr., suffocate ('abudi is also used by some).
abur: m. or f.n., behaviour, conduct, temper. —ki or —ti; aburkisu wa side? how does he behave? aburkisu wa sida, he behaves so; abur fi'an, good temper; abur hun, bad temper.
aburan: v.p., be produced, created; aburma, wan abtirmi, wan aburmai, I was created.
aburan, m.n., creation. —ki; aburnin. —ti, f.n., is also used.
aburan, a.v., created; wah aburan, a created thing.
ad: a. and ad., well, nice, good, loud, strong (this word is an adverb when u is added to it. Ex. kitabkas wa ad, that book is nice; ad u tol, sew well; ad u hadal, speak well or loudly; ad u adkai, make it strongly; ad u dis, build well.
'ad: m.n., piece of meat, flesh. —ki (the plural 'adad is not used by all) ; 'adki i dib, give me the piece of meat ; 'adki i wada ken or 'adadki i ken, bring me the pieces of meat.
'adaw: v.att., be, become white (no imperative) ; wan 'adan. (When this verb is used in the imperative, it is a kind of curse.)
'adaisnaw: v.att., remain or be white, clean; distigu wa 'adaisanyahai, the kettle is made white or cleansed.
'adaisan: a.v.,made white, cleansed; maro 'adaisan, clean linen.
'adab: f.n., hell. —ti. ; 'adab yar, purgatory. dab 'adabed, m.n., hell fire. —ki.
'adab or 'adib, v.tr., torment, torture; 'adab means also condemn to hell.
'adad: fn., kind of acacia tree with stiff and bent thorns, gum-tree. —di.
adad: m.n., excrescence of flesh in a sore. —ki.
'adadi: 'adadi, v.tr., press. (In the jungle Somals, when making their enclosure or fence round their huts, press together the trees cut for that purpose, in order that the branches may be straight, so as to form a close and tough hedge.)
adag: a., dear (price), fast firm, hard, strong, light, tough, permanent. (This word is used for things only.)
adkai: v.tr., fasten, strengthen, tighten, make strong. ha lagu adka, v.p., be fastened.
adkaw: v.att., be firm, strong, fastened. ka adkaw, v.a., overcome him, her; ka adka, he overcomes, overcame him ; ka adkatai, she overcomes, overcame ; wa laga adka, adkadai, he, she is overcome.
adai: m.n., arak tree (Capparis sodata), small stick used by Somals for cleaning their teeth. -gi.
'adanyo: 'adanyo or 'adanyod, v.i., have an itching. —da, wan —n.
'adar: 'adar, m.m., haziness, hazy weather, drizzling rain. —ki (no plur.) 'adar da, it drizzles or drizzling rain is falling.
adar: m.n., earthen pot with two handles in which food is cooked. —ki.
'ad'ed: f.n, rays of the sun, sun. —di; eg! 'ad'eddi da'dai, look! the sun is setting; war! 'ad'eddi so bahdai, ina kena, mesha ka so'onai, the rays of the sun appear, let us go away from the place. —di.
aderyo 'ari: lesser koodoo antelope (used for both genders). N.B. Somals generally make no difference between aderyo and aderyo 'ari. They call the males godir, and the females aderyo.
adin: adin, v.tr., call to prayer ; adima, wan adimi.
'aḋo: f.n., anger, indignation, rage, wrath (no plur.).
'ado, v.i., rage. —da, wan —n. u 'ado, v.tr., rage against.
'aḋaisi: with ka, v.c, provoke, make him angry, enrage.
af badan: a., sharp ; mindi af badan, a sharp knife.
af daran: a., blunt; mindidi afka daraid i ken, bring me the blunt knife.
afdub: afdub, m.n., closing of the mouth to prevent a man from crying out when they rob his cattle and sheep. —ki ; ninkas afdubkisi mid ad u aha, the gagging of that man was good.
af'eli: v.tr., interpret (this verb is used with uga, ka, or u ka la); wan u ka la af'elin, I interpret or I will interpret.
aftiro: v.tr., wipe your lips ; aftirta, wan aftiran. Somals also use aftiro for 'take some food.'
afyahan: m.n. and a., eloquent, eloquent man, tame. —ki; aniga afyahan miihi, I am not eloquent, or not an eloquent man; faras afyahan, a tame horse dinnad aftahan, a tame cat dinnaddi afkatihin, the tame cat.
afarr: n.c, four.—ti; afarr nagod, four women.
afrad: n.c.o., fourth; ki afrad (m.), the fourth.
afarr iyo tobnad: n.c.o., fourteenth, a fortnight ; afarr iyo tobnadki, the fortnight.
'affi: 'affi, m.n., forgiveness, pardon. —gi. war! iss 'affiya, v.r., pardon each other (plur.)
afimad: m.n., health. —ki; ma afimad habta? are you in good health? ha wa ladnahai, yes I am.
afo: f.n., woman, lady; afada serkalka, the wife of the governor.
afur: m.n., a small meal taken at about six o'clock in the evening during the time of fasting, while the muezzin is calling Mussulmans to prayer. The other meal, taken from 12 p.m. to 4 a.m. is called suhur.
'agta'ad: f.n., foot-sole; agti 'adaid, the sole of the foot.
ag: ad., near (this word is never used alone) ; agta, agtaida kalai, come near (me) ; agtisi tag, go near (to him).
agan: f.n., bark vessel (shaped like a double cone, and protected by a light framework of wood called sab). —ti.
agon: m.n., orphan boy. -ki (the plural for both sexes is agonadi).

agon, /.«., orphan girl. ti (this word is also used for both sexes) Berberah agonadu wa ku badanyihin, or Berberah agontu wa ku badantahai, or war Berberi wa agon badan tahai, there are many orphans in Berberah.
ah: (root) v., he (often used as an affix; scarcely ever alone).
ahaw: ha ahato, or ha ahatai e, loc. meaning nevertheless, never mind, be it so.
ahdi: m.n., oath, swearing, alliance, treaty made by an oath. -gi. ahdi Ebbahai inan ka kausin, I swear by God that I will kill you.

ahdi, v.tr., swear, make a treaty, an alliance grounded upon an oath; wa la iss ahdiyai o dagal ma jiro, I made a treaty that we may not fight; kal hore yainu iss ahdinai lakin ahdigi wa adigi beinaiyai, last year we made a treaty, but you perjured yourself, or you did not remain faithful to it.
ahal horti: m.n. fa9ade, house-front. -ki. ahalka hortisi bai jogan, or wa ku joga, they are before, or in front of, the house.
ahbal: or ka ahbal, v.tr., accept, listen to, receive (in addressing ourselves to God); Ilahow naga ahbal, O God, hear us Ilahhai dua'daida ha iga ahbalo, or dua'daida Ilah ha iga ahbalo, may God hear our prayers.
ahbal, with kaga, v.tr., kill ninki kaga ahbal, kill the man (used especially in quarrelling and fighting).
ahil: m.n., Somali chief, sage, respectable man. —ki; aḥilki Karin yan arkai shalai, yesterday I saw the chief of Karan; ahilo, or uḥul, or uḥal are also used. -ki; —shi; —shi.
'aïah: a..., cursed; eraigi ‘aïda aha, the cursed word.
'aï: v.tr., curse, abuse. —a, wan ‘aï, wan 'aïtamaya or wan ‘aïaya, I am cursing, abusing him.
'aïd: f.n., poor man (having nothing at all). —di.
a'imad: m.n., tame beast flying, running away. -ki. (They call so a camel which is not yet accustomed to carry loads, and is afraid.)
aiya!: int., used in the place of warya in speaking to the parents or other respectable persons aiya abba, abbe, or abbo! O father! aiya hoyo! or ai hoyo! O mother!
‘ajibi: v.tr., please, make glad somebody, consent to.
ajis: (m.) ‘ajisad (f.), n. and a, indolent, lazy. -ki; ajisin (plur.), ‘ajis, or 'ajisad ban ahai, I am lazy.
‘al: or ma'al, f.n., dew-lap (also used for Somali sheep).
‘ala'al: or ‘alaan'al, m.n., regret. sorrow (also the expression of regret you feel at being unable to help someone). 'ala’alkisi bu i siyai, he expressed to me his regret; inanka 'alaan’alkisi ba ku fogadai o la talin kari wainai, the sorrow of that child was so deep that we could not console him.
‘ala’al: with u, .., regret, repent; dembigaigi yan ad iyo ad ugu ‘ala'alsanahai, Lrepent heartily of my sins.
‘alaa’al: or 'alaan'al, f.n., palm of the hand, -shi.
‘ala‘al: m.n., a person deprived of all his goods and fortune.
'ala’al: v., be deprived of, lose; bai! bai! 'ala'alaieh ho gai o ho gail exclamation of sorrow, the crying of women when beaten, I lost all!
‘alan: m.n., flag, ensign.—ki; hori alan, flagstaff
‘alen: f.n., leaf, leaves (also used for tea). -ti.
‘alid: v.i., fester, grow virulent; hontisu malin walba wa si ‘alidaisa, his sore is growing more virulent every day. (For a sore becoming worse, see Aid. When there is an excresence of flesh they say adad.)

abwaanno.name: Abwaan Urursan (Qaamuus Af-Soomaali - Af-Ruush) - D. I. Estebanyenko, Maxamed Xaaji Cismaan [1969]

aad: очень, весьма; вполне; ~ iyo ~ очень, сильно; понастоящему.
aan: без-, не-; ~ deegin не-достаточный; - dhadhan la һауп безвкусный, невкус-ный; ~ garaad la hayn бездарный (о человеке); habaysnayn перегулярный: ~ xad la hayn безгранич-ный, беспредельный; - хаlliban ahayn мутный, непрозрачный; ~ jігіп отсут-ствующий; ~ la aqoon незнакомый; безвестный; ~ la arkin невидимый; ~ macne lа һаул незначитель-ный, маловажный; - run аһауп фальшивый, неверный; ~ wax tarin бесполезный,

aa': v. tr. 1 (ay, day) 1. Minacciare qn.; colpire qn. o qs.; aggredire qn. 2. Is a.: combattere; scontrarsi; azzuffarsi.
aa: aa2 pr. cl. so. 1. vr. di aad'. 2. vr. di aydin.
aa³ es. - Ahi!; ah! (per esprimere dolore).
aabayeel: aabayeel v. it. 1 (-eelay, -eeshay) - U a.: dare importanza a qs., avere interesse per qs.
aabayeelid: nv. f. di aabayeel?. vr. aabayeel'.
aabbe: n. m. (-bayaal, m. of.)- 1. Padre. 2. Il pl. anche: antenati.
aabbur: n. m. (-rro, f) - Coperchio concavo che viene inserito nell'apertura del recipiente e non appoggiato.
aabbur2 v. tr. I (-ray, -rtay) Tappare qs.; chiudere o coprire con un coperchio qs.
aabburan: v. it. 1 (-rmay, -rantay; -rmi) - Venire tappato; venire chiuso o coperto con un coperchio.
aabburan2 v. it. 4 (-rnaa, -rnayd) - Essere tappato; essere chiuso o coperto con un coperchio.
aabburnaan: nv. f. di aabburan?, vr. aabburnaansho.
aabburnaansho: n. m. of. vr. di aabburnaan.
aabee: v. tr. 2 (-eeyay, -eysay) - 1. Tenere conto di qn. o qs., attribuire importanza a qn. o qs. 2. Ungere o spalmare di resina qs. per impermeabilizzarlo (og. un recipiente).
aabiweyrax: n. m. (-xyo, f.)- Reazione violenta, aggressione ingiustificata.
aabyoo: v. it. 3 (-ooday, -ootay) - Ku a.: offendere qn., fare una prepotenza a qn., essere arrogante con qn.
aad: n. m. - 1. (-dyo, f.) Isku aa. cayaar: incontro di gioco, partita. 2. vr. di aadid.
aad2 n. f. av. 1. Molto, bene. 2. A. yar: vr. di aayar.

aad3 v. 1 (-day, -dday) - 1. tr. Recarsi in un lg., partire per un lg. 2. it. Ku a.: reggere il confronto con qn. o qs., essere pari a qn. o qs.; essere puntato o rivolto verso qn. o qs.; allinearsi; adattarsi.
aad pr. cl. so. 1. vr. aa². Tu. 2. vr. di aydin.
aadaab: n. m. Educazione, il comportarsi bene o educatamente.
aadaamid: nv. f. di aadaan2, vr. aadaan', aaddamid, aaddan', eedaamid, eedaan'.
aadaan: aadaan2 v. it. 1 (-aamay, -aantay), vr. aaddan2, eedaan2-1. Invitare o chiamare alla preghiera (so. muezzin). 2. Lamentarsi per il dolore (so. capra).
aadami: n. m. co., vr. aadane, aadmi - 1. Umanità, esseri umani. 2. A. ahaan: condizione umana, natura umana.
aadaminnimo: n. f., vr. aadminnimo - Umanità, l'essere umani.

à: adresser une lettre à qn - ku socota.
abaisser: abaisser, v. - hoos u dhigid; ka hoose
abandonner: abandonner, v. - ka haajirid; ka tegid aan soo noqod lahayn.
abat-jour: abat-jour, n.m. - daharka nalka lagaliyo si loo dhimo ifka nalka
abattage: abattage, n.m. - qalid (qalida xoolaha); goyn (goynta geedaha)
abattis: abattis, n.m. - neef la qalay (dhamaanti); isku gayn geedihii la gooyay oo dhan
abattoir: abattoir, n.m. - xerodhig; meesha xoolaha lagu gawraco; kawaan
abattre: abattre qn - qof dilid; qudh ka jarid
abeille: abeille, n.f. - shinni: cayayaanka malabka sameeya
essaim d'abeilles - raxan u wada socoda shinnida
abhorrer: abhorrer, v. - karhid; aad u necbaysi; nebcaysad
abîme: abîme, n.m. - god dheer oo aan guntiisa la arkayn (cadaabta aakhiro)
abimer: abimer, v. - baabi'in; burburin; kharibaad; wax xumayn
abjurer: abjurer, v. - ka dhaariska laga dhaarto; ka noqosho
aboiement: aboiement, n.m. - jilifta dhirta; cida eyga
abominable: abominable, adj. - la nebcaysto; aan la jeclaysan; karaahiyo
abondance: abondance, n.f. - isku filaansho; aad u badan; maalqabis; farabadan
abondant: abondant, adj. - ka badan intii loo baahnaa; xaddi badan; badan
peu abondant - ay adag tahay siday ugu filaato; si adag ugu filan; aan laga haysan tiro ku filan; ka yar intii loo baahnaa.
abord: île d'un abord dangereux - jasiirad galitaanka xeebteedu adag yahay
les abords d'une ville - agagaarka magaalada
d'abord - ugu horayn; hor iyo horan
tout d'abord - tan koobaad; tan ugu horaysa
abordable: abordable, adj. - cagli gal; wax macquul ah ama sabab yeelan kare
aborder: aborder un bateau - weerar kadis ah oo markaab lagu qaado
aborder une personne - salaamid; qof dariiqa lagu salaamo
aborigène: aborigène, n. et adj. - dadkii ama waxyaabihii kale oo meel loogu yimid iyaga oo sii deggan ama siijooga
aboutir: aboutir, v. - meel gaadhid (halka uu socdaalku ku eg yahay)
ce champ aboutit à un chemin - beertani waxay dhinaca ku haysa jid ama wado
tous ces raisonnements aboutissent au même résultat - falanqayntanu ama indha indhayntan kala duwan biyadhacoodu waa isku mid
cette affaire a finalement abouti - arintan ugu dambays goolba laga gaadhay
aboyer: le chien aboit - eeygu wuu ciyayaa
aboyer après, contre qn - ku qaylin qof; canaanasho qof
abrégé: abrégé, v. - hadal; goraal; oo yar ama wakhti yar u eg
écrire les mots en abrégé - soo gaabin erayo, sida JDS (erayada oo la soo gaabsho)
abréviation: abréviation, n.f. - eraya soo gaabiskiisa; soo gaabis
abri: abri, n.m. - hooy; meel loo hoydo; aqal; guri; min
être à l'abri - ammaan leh; lagu nabadgeli karo
abriter: abriter, v. - ilaalin; badbaadin; daaficid; ka ilaalid
absent: absent, adj. - qofka maqan; qofka aan joogin
absolu: absolu, adj. et n. - kaamil ah; si qoto dheer; dhammaystiiran ugu sarreeya (darajo ama awood)
absorber: s'absorber dans ses pensées - mashquulin; la mashquuliyo
abstenir: abstenir, s'a.), v.pr. - ka celin (qof); waxyaa-baha mukhaadaradka ah
abstrait: abstrait, adj. - waxa aan la taaban; sida quruxda; urta
absurdité: absurdité, n.f. - aan cagliga gelayn; macno daro
dire des absurdités - iska hadlid; si aad u hadlid
abus: abus, n.m. - ku talaxtag; ku xad dhaafid
abus d'autorité - cadaadid; hoos u cadaadin
abuser: abuser, V. - si xun wax ula dhaqanto (u tidhaahdo); khiyaamayn
acacia: acacia, n.m. - dhirta xabagta leh; dhirta laga xabakaysto
académie: académie, n.f. - dugsi wax barasho heer sare oo loogu tala galay aqoon gaar ah
accentuer: accentuer, v. - xarakayn; qoraalka oo la xarakeyo
acceptation: acceptation, n.f. - macne laysku racay oo eray lee yahay
accepter: accepter, v. - aqbalid; la aqbalo; layeelo
accès: accès, n.m. - jid meel loo maro; weerar kadis ah; oggolaansho (meel gelid)
accidentel: accidentel, adj. - si iska fursad ah isaga dhacay; iska dhacay.
acclamation: acclamation, n.f. - ku raacis xamaasad leh.
acclamer: acclamer, V. - soo dhaweyn xamaasad leh.
accompagner: accompagner, v. - raacraacid; wehel yeelid la rafiqid
S'il vous plait, pouvez vous m'accompagner? - Bil ixsaanak, i'dhawee, hadaadan ka xumeyn.
accomplir: accomplir, v. - ka yeesho; dhammayn; lib ku dhammayn.
accomplissement: accomplissement, n.m. - wax si guul ah loo qabtay; guul ku dhammays.
accompte: accompte, n.m. - wax u gaar ah; ku kooban meel ama degmo.
accord: je ne suis pas d'accord - ma oggoli.
accorder: accorder un délai - dib u dhigid.
accordéon: accordéon, n.m. - nooc ka mid ah qalabka muusigga la garaaco; fiisarmooniyo
accoutrement: accoutrement, n.m. - geer; biraha ilkaha is gala leh; sida kuwa gaariga wada.
accréditer: accréditer, v. - dirid danjire wata warqadihiisii.
accroc: accroc, n.m. - dalool gaar ahaan dharka; jeexdin (dhar)
accrocher: accrocher, v. - deldelid laadlaadin; deldelaad ama soo laalaadin.
accroissement: accroissement, n.m. - dulsaar ku dul korodh.
accumulateur: accumulateur, n.m. - beytariga weyn ee korontada sida: ka baabuurta oo kale.
accumuler: accumuler, v. - ururin tiro badan; isdul tuulid
accusé: accusé, n. - xidhan; maxbuus; qof jeelka ku xidhan;
acétylène: acétylène, n.m. - neef bilaa midab ah oo lagu shito tiriig gaar ah iyo xaxyaabo kale (alxanka naqaska)
acharner: acharner, s'a.v.pr. - si aad ah mihimad xoog leh u siiya; aad ugu iisha
achever: achever, v. - dhammayn; lib ku dhammayn
achromatique: achromatique, adj. - wax aan midab lahayn
acide: acide, n. et adj. - aaysiidh; aashito
acier: acier, n.m. - bir adag oo ah isku darka xadiidka iyo kaarboon ama curiye kale: xadiid
acquérir: acquérir, v. - marka aad wax ku heeshid aqoon; karti; macaash; la helo
acquitter: s'acquitter - la raalli geliyo; raalli gelin la siiyo
acte: acte, n.m. - wax qabasho; wax falid; fal
acteur: acteur , n.m. - irbe; ninka jilaha ah (riwaayadaha ama filimada); qofka ciyaartoyga ah; jilaa
actif: actif, adj. - firfircoon; wax qabanaya; digtoon; feejigan
action: action, n.f. - wax qabasho; wax falid; dhaqaaq; la qabanayo
actionner: actionner, v. - ku dhalisa wax qabasho; ficil
